struct_node_list:
struct signal_info
{
  const int value;		/* The numeric value from <signal.h> */
  const char *const name;	/* The equivalent symbolic value */
#ifndef HAVE_SYS_SIGLIST
  const char *const msg;	/* Short message about this value */
#endif
}
